/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/MedianCut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/src/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/P2_GetYourPaletteHere.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o -o P2_GetYourPaletteHere  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
